race.comment: SADLERS SYMPHONY (4) is looking to bounce back here third up having struggled on the very heaving going at Warrnambool last time when in the market in what looks a deeper maiden. The fresh run was solid at Terang despite going under at $1.65 and this looks very winnable. FIERCE KIWI (7) is a lightly raced filly for the Tzaferis yard who is off a let up leading into this, just finding one better at Murray Bridge last start over 1600m. She'll roll forward and take catching. PATH TO VICTORY (3) comes back slightly in trip having just missed at a big price at Stawell when last seen. He'll be strong late and hard to hold out. JANEY BOPPER (8) has placed in her past couple and turns around quickly here from Werribee, expect she's staying on.
